title: How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
summary: Claude Design is an AI design tool from Anthropic that enables creation of branded landing pages and design assets through a design system framework. The tutorial demonstrates a 4-step workflow including design system setup, generation, editing, and deployment as a production-ready alternative to traditional design software.
writeup: The video walks through Claude Design, an AI design tool from Anthropic for building branded landing pages and design assets within a design system framework. It demonstrates a four-step workflow: design system setup, generation, editing, and deployment. The framing positions Claude Design as a production-ready alternative to traditional design software, with the design system acting as the structure that keeps generated assets consistent.
